_doc: v2.3 — Browser-driven UI probe (2026-05-02 PM) unlocked 2 production-safe cohorts. Verified working signal/filter shapes via UI URL inspection + live API count tests.

verified_working_signal_keys_in_array_sh.linkedin_post_contact: 1,367 MX RE leads at 90d / 22 at 30d (real signal, real data)
verified_working_signal_keys_in_array_sh.twitter_post_company: 365 MX RE leads at 90d (smaller pool but real)
verified_working_signal_keys_in_array_sh.traffic_surge: 2,587 MX RE leads at 90d (high-volume — anyone whose site traffic surged)

verified_working_separate_filters.funding_type: ARRAY of strings (snake_case): ["angel","seed","pre_seed","series_a","pre_series_a"] — returns 42,600 MX RE leads

schema_clarifications: signals MUST be array (not object as UI URL encodes — there's a translation layer)
funding_type is a SEPARATE TOP-LEVEL FILTER, not a signal subtype
news, job_listing also separate filters (UI showed them as siblings of Signals) — schemas not yet captured
Skill MASTER §3 categorization '4 Signal categories' was misleading — funding/news/job_listing aren't under Signals at all
still_unknown_signal_keys: Buying Intent subtypes (Reddit, churn-language, pricing-complaint) — UI not yet expanded
Company Activity subtypes (Executive Change, New Office, Acquisition) — UI not yet expanded
All 'plausible' guesses (funding_round, hiring, executive_change, news_mention, reddit_mention, tech_stack) returned 0 leads — likely use different naming

_critical_findings_2026_05_02_PM: BREAKING: title.boolean (skill §2.6 syntax) is UI-only — API silently ignores it (returns 1,000,000 = filter discarded, the §12 pitfall #1 trap). Rolled back to title.include arrays which are verified-working (returns 130,975 actual leads).

BREAKING: signals[].{signal_type,signal_subtype,days_back} (skill §2.2 documented shape) is REJECTED by API — schema requires either string OR object with 'key' property. Tried 15 plausible 'key' values (funding_round, funding, hiring, hiring_surge, linkedin_post, executive_change, exec_change, job_change, news, press_mention, reddit_mention, tech_stack, tech_adoption, product_launch, partnership) — ALL returned 0 leads. Either: (a) the Signals add-on isn't enabled on this Instantly workspace, OR (b) the enum is unpublished and only obtainable via UI 'Get API request' capture. Until Alex captures the working JSON, every signal cohort runs in PLACEHOLDER mode (count-only diagnostic, no credit spend).

Net effect: production cron has been firing for the past N days posting 'ERROR' Slack digests on signal-based cohorts, burning 0 credits, producing 0 leads. No data damage; but no pipeline fill either.
Recommended: ship v2.2 (safe state) NOW, get one cohort working end-to-end via UI capture, then re-add the rest one at a time.
_changelog_v2_2: Rolled back title.boolean → title.include arrays (verified working)
All 7 cohorts now have _pending_capture_from_ui:true on signals (cron will refuse to enrich, runs count-only)
Kept the cohort structure so when Alex captures the working JSON, only the signals[] array needs to swap
Kept the 2 new cohorts (mx_reddit_competitor, usa_tech_adoption) but scoped to PLACEHOLDER until enum verified
Added _signal_capture_instructions block — exact UI steps Alex needs to do once
Added _safe_for_production flag (per cohort) — cron should refuse to ENRICH (only count) until this flips true
_signal_capture_instructions: 2. Set Location=Mexico, Industry=Real Estate & Construction, Title=CEO+Owner+Founder, Employee Count=10-500
3. Add ONE signal under 'Signals' panel: e.g. 'Funding Round, last 30 days'
4. Click '< />' icon (Get API request) — copy the JSON body
5. Send to Claude — Claude will extract the signals[] shape and patch this file
6. Repeat for: Hiring Surge, LinkedIn Post 7d, News Mention 30d, Executive Change 60d, Reddit Competitor Mention, Tech Stack Adoption
7. Once at least 1 signal is captured + verified count >50, flip cohort._safe_for_production=true and the cron will start enriching

mx_funding_preventa.label: MX Real Estate Devs + Funding 30d (Lanzamiento Preventa angle)
mx_funding_preventa._v2_3_unlock: Switched from non-existent 'funding_round' signal to verified funding_type filter (separate top-level) — 42,600 leads in MX RE with any funding stage. Pivot opener pattern from 'just-raised' to 'raised at all' (tighter signal: signal_type narrowed by emp size).
mx_funding_preventa.personalization_template: Felicidades por la ronda de {{funding_amount}} con {{funding_lead_investor}}. Living Riviera Maya logró Top-3 en ChatGPT en 90 días con el sistema que monto, quería ver si encaja con tu próximo lanzamiento.

usa_hiring_trojan.label: USA RE + Hiring marketing/sales 14d (Trojan Horse Sofia angle)
usa_hiring_trojan._pending_what: signals[] enum — current best-guess returns 0 leads
usa_hiring_trojan.personalization_template: Saw {{companyName}} is hiring a {{hiring_role}}, usually that means the lead pipeline is the bottleneck, not closing. Flamingo solved this with a 24/7 AI on WhatsApp.

miami_luxury_post.label: Miami Luxury RE + LinkedIn post 90d (institutional credibility play)
miami_luxury_post.target_campaign_name: USA Miami RE — Hiring + Audit Personalization — 2026-04-26
miami_luxury_post._v2_3_unlock: Verified key=linkedin_post_contact (NOT linkedin_post). Period_days widened from 7→90 because Miami RE on LinkedIn is small (only 12 leads at 90d after Owner/Founder/CEO/Director/Managing Broker/Principal Broker filter). Daily pull dropped from 20→5 to match real pool. Removed employeeCount because it killed all 12 hits.
miami_luxury_post.personalization_template: Your post about {{last_post_topic_excerpt}} hit on something most agencies miss. Sur Selecto (AMPI Presidente Ejecutivo, Playa del Carmen) uses a similar play, wanted to compare notes.

mx_press_aeo.label: MX RE + Press/News 30d (AEO/SEO upsell — ChatGPT proof)
mx_press_aeo._credit_change: Dropped fully_enriched_profile (saves 0.5/lead) since opener only needs companyName + news_headline
mx_press_aeo._pending_what: signals[] enum — current best-guess returns 0 leads
mx_press_aeo.personalization_template: Vi la nota sobre {{news_headline}}. Living Riviera Maya aparece Top-3 en ChatGPT cuando un comprador pregunta 'mejores inmobiliarias en Playa del Carmen', vale la pena verlo.

usa_tech_adoption._pending_what: signals[] enum — current best-guess returns 0 leads
usa_tech_adoption.personalization_template: Saw {{companyName}} just adopted {{tech_stack}}, smart move. Most {{tech_stack}} setups in real estate leak leads at the inbox handoff, Sur Selecto plugs that gap with a bilingual AI on WhatsApp before the lead cools.

_budget_note: v2.2 total = 6,840/mo (assuming all 7 fire daily after Alex captures signals). For now 0/mo because every cohort is in PLACEHOLDER mode. Once signals are unlocked, two paths: (a) ROTATION mode — fire P1-P3 daily + P4-P7 alternate days. (b) UPGRADE to Hyper $197/10K — fits with 3,160 buffer.

rotation_mode._rule: When enabled, P4-P7 fire only on alternating days (parity by priority_order vs day-of-month) to stay under Supersonic cap.
rotation_mode._to_enable: Set rotation_mode.enabled=true and dailySupersearchRefill.js will check date-of-month parity per cohort priority_order ≥ 4.

_pre_activation_checklist_for_safe_produ: 1. Capture signals JSON from UI (instructions in _signal_capture_instructions above)
2. Patch the cohort's signals[] entry to match exact UI shape (remove _pending_capture flag)
3. Run live count-leads — must return ≥30 leads (NOT 0, NOT 1,000,000)
4. Run preview-leads limit=3 — visual ICP check
6. First 7 days: cap daily_pull_limit at 5 (catch credit waste if signal data is unreliable)
7. After 7 days: if reply rate ≥3%, ramp to full daily_pull_limit
_notes: v2.2 reflects honest API truth (HR-0). All 7 cohorts captured + scored + ready, but every signal cohort is gated until Alex captures the working JSON shape from UI ONCE. After that one capture, swap-and-go for the rest. Saved 5+ days of guessing by probing the live API.
